mapper.sql: select id, stock_code, kline_type, trade_time, open_price, close_price, high_price, low_price, volume, amount from stock_kline
mapper.insert:
insert ignore into stock_kline ( stock_code, kline_type, trade_time, open_price, close_price, high_price, low_price, volume, amount ) values
(#{item.stockCode}, #{item.klineType}, #{item.tradeTime}, #{item.openPrice}, #{item.closePrice}, #{item.highPrice}, #{item.lowPrice}, #{item.volume}, #{item.amount})
mapper.delete: delete from stock_kline where stock_code = #{stockCode} and kline_type = #{klineType}
